prompt: Cast highlights and shadows according to this light direction.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by adding highlights and shadows to all depicted elements, including the characters, the 'GET WELL CARDS' sign, and the card display stand. The illumination should be consistent with a single light source originating from the top-right, as indicated by the sun's position in the sky diagram of image 2. Ensure shadows are cast towards the bottom-left, creating a sense of depth and form on the flat line art.
objects: Highlights on depicted elements (consistent with top-right light source)
Shadows on depicted elements (cast towards bottom-left)
